top_signals.title: A Fresh Look at the Houthi Threat to Maritime Shipping
top_signals.summary:
In 2024, Allison Minor wrote, “Solving the Houthi Threat to Freedom of Navigation,” where she argued the international response to Houthi attacks on shipping in the Red Sea has so far been inadequate and proposed a U.N.-led solution. Two years later, with global attention once again focused on maritime shipping activity, we asked Allison to review her arguments. Image: Petty Officer 1st Class Jonathan Word via DVIDSWhen you wrote about the Houthi threat in 2024, the activities in the Red Sea commanded high global attention. Two years on, that attention has largely shifted to the Strait of Hormuz. What has been

The post A Fresh Look at the Houthi Threat to Maritime Shipping appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Circle gets an OCC bank charter as stablecoin competition heats up, shares surge 14%
top_signals.summary: Stablecoin issuer Circle surged in premarket trading after the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency granted it approval to operate as a trust bank.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Circle soars after securing U.S. trust bank approval in crypto expansion
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Robinhood Chain sees over $70M in ETH bridged during first week
top_signals.summary: Robinhood’s choice to use Ethereum further solidifies its position as the “ultimate settlement layer and liquidity foundation for tokenized assets,” said HashKey Group’s Tim Sun.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: US Stock Futures Slip After Tech Rally, SK Hynix Starts Trading
top_signals.summary: US equity futures edged lower on Friday as investors digested the record US listing of South Korea’s SK Hynix Inc. and prepared for the start of second-quarter earnings season.

top_signals.title: Erika McEntarfer: ‘You really can just fire the BLS commissioner’
top_signals.summary: The former labour statistics chief on the fragility (and strength) of US economic data

top_signals.title: Wall Street banks tighten prediction market rules for staff as insider fears spread
top_signals.summary: Wall Street banks, including Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley, are restricting employee prediction market trades as insider trading fears spread across Polymarket and Kalshi.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: North Carolina passes bill recognizing CFTC preemption over prediction markets
top_signals.summary: North Carolina's new law taxes prediction market platforms at 6% of their net trading fee revenue that is attributable to North Carolina residents.
